name: Lake Victoria Shoreline Buffer — Homa Bay
blocking_factor: Fishing community livelihoods dependent on shoreline access
notes: Buffer mapped. Fishing communities' boat landing sites within buffer. Enforcement would displace primary livelihood. NEMA-county standoff since 2020.

name: Homa Bay Town Drainage
blocking_factor: County revenue constraints and contractor default
notes: Phase 1 procurement completed 2021. Contractor abandoned site. Re-procurement 2023. Delayed 2+ years.

name: Nyando-Homa Bay Early Warning Coordination
notes: Nyando River flows through Kisumu before Lake Victoria affects Homa Bay. Upstream-downstream alert chain not designed.

name: Suba Islands Evacuation Plan
source: Homa Bay County / Kenya Red Cross
blocking_factor: Island community access during flood conditions
notes: Plan exists. Boat capacity assessed. Two island communities not covered. Radio communication plan not tested in 2022 or 2023.
